form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on March 10 at Geelong over 400m. Last start was fourth over 485m in 27.92, behind Lektra Isa. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Mt Gambier when only a neck from the winner but did record a head turning 29.59 over the 512m journey. Has the ability and looks an each way chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at Horsham over 485m (27.40) beating Paw Harris in Grade 5 on March 31. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 1.75 lengths second over 450m Warrnambool in 25.73. Has clocked a blistering 29.27 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 460m at Warragul in a handy (26.08), beating Escaping Bindi. Will find this a bit tougher, prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 515m at this track behind Hoppy beaten 9 lengths (30.25). Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (26.05) over 460m at Warragul. Jumps from a wide draw. Looks tested in this line-up.
